---
title: "Week 4: Simple forecasting methods"
---


::: {.cell}

:::


## What you will learn this week

* Forecasting workflow
* Four benchmark forecasting methods that we will use for comparison
* Linear trends, dummy seasonality
* Forecasting with transformations
* Forecasting with decompositions

## Pre-class activities

* Read [Chapter 5 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/toolbox.html), Sections 5.1 -- 5.3, 5.6 -- 5.7, and watch all embedded videos
* Read [Chapter 7.4 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/useful-predictors.html), and watch the embedded video

## Exercises (on your own or in tutorial)

* Complete Exercises 1-5, 11 from [Section 5.11 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/toolbox-exercises.html).
* Complete Exercises 2 and 6 from [Section 7.10 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/regression-exercises.html)
* [Solutions to Exercises](ex4-sol.qmd)
* [Recorded tutorial code](tutorial_code.R)



[Code used in lecture](lecture4.R)



[Code used in workshop](workshop_code.R)
